qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Joe Bell (New Zealand).
Attempt saved. Arya Yousefi (IR Iran) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Max Crocombe (New Zealand). Assisted by Saman Ghoddos.

events.description: 艾莉亚·优素菲射正。 萨曼·戈多斯参与进攻。

events.description: 伊莱贾·贾斯特 进球，克里斯·伍德 助攻

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Shahriyar Moghanloo (IR Iran).
Attempt missed. Sarpreet Singh (New Zealand) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Elijah Just.

events.description: 萨普里特·辛格射门偏出。 伊莱贾·贾斯特参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Marko Stamenic (New Zealand) right footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked.

events.description: 马尔科·斯塔梅尼奇射门被封堵。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, New Zealand. Conceded by Arya Yousefi.

events.description: 卡勒姆·麦考瓦特射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Chris Wood (New Zealand) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.

events.description: 克里斯·伍德射门被封堵。 卡勒姆·麦考瓦特参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Shahriyar Moghanloo (IR Iran).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt saved. Sarpreet Singh (New Zealand) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alireza Beiranvand (IR Iran). Assisted by Finn Surman.

events.description: 萨普里特·辛格射正。 芬·苏尔曼参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Ramin Rezaeian (IR Iran) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Mehdi Taremi (IR Iran) hits the right post with a right footed shot from outside the box. Assisted by Ali Nemati following a fast break.

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.

events.description: 萨曼·戈多斯射门偏出。 穆罕默德·莫赫比参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Liberato Cacace (New Zealand) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Alireza Beiranvand (IR Iran). Assisted by Sarpreet Singh.

events.description: 利贝拉托·卡卡斯射正。 萨普里特·辛格参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Saman Ghoddos (IR Iran) left footed shot from the right side of the box is too high. Assisted by Mohammad Mohebbi.
